title: /ask can't answer questions about smackerel itself (grounding gap)
blockedReason: Fix DELIVERED and live — resolved by supersession via spec 104 (option A: self-knowledge ingestion into the dedicated smackerel_self pgvector namespace, surfaced via the self_knowledge tool). Deployed to home-lab and verified live 2026-07-23 (core 3b6261a9 / ml 25f36dc5; smackerel_self corpus ingested); /ask now answers product meta-questions with real citations, with the cite-back verifier + BUG-061-009 honest refusal unchanged as the fallback. This diagnosis bug did NO implementation itself (it routed its fix to spec 104), so it cannot satisfy the done-status specialist-phase gate (implement/test/validate/audit) on its own artifact without fabrication — hence terminal status blocked, mirroring spec 104. The single genuinely-remaining item is the operator's live Telegram behavioral smoke test, shared with spec 104 (operator-only: agents cannot send Telegram / prod HTTP needs a PASETO token); the behavior is already e2e-proven — and as of commit 4a7c545d the RENDER half is AUTOMATED via internal/telegram/assistant_connector_smoke_test.go, a connector-only /ask smoke (inject inbound + capture rendered outbound, no Telegram client) asserting the grounded cited answer + the honest refusal at the exact connector boundary the user sees. The remaining operator item is narrowed to a final live-prod confirmation. No further agent work remains on this bug.
discoveredBy: operator (live /ask on the home-lab bot; diagnosed during BUG-061-009 close-out)
dependsOn: specs/061-conversational-assistant/bugs/BUG-061-009-high-band-refusal-masked-as-saved-as-idea (done — made this case refuse honestly instead of masking as 'saved as an idea')

diagnosis.summary: Grounding/data gap, not a code defect. Neither web_search (public web doesn't know the private product — searxng returns Super Mario Wiki for 'smackerel') nor internal_retrieval (product's own docs never ingested) nor the local LLM (no training data on a private product) can ground an answer about smackerel itself. The cite-back verifier + provenance gate correctly refuse the uncited synthesis.
liveEvidence: open_knowledge wired: provider=searxng model=gemma4:26b synthesis_model=qwen3:30b-a3b tool_count=4 (core startup log)

direct searxng query 'smackerel second brain' -> top result 'Smackerel - Super Mario Wiki ... enemies that appear in Super Mario Bros. Wonder ... resemble flatfish' (public web has no knowledge of the product)
